name: zen-history-graph
description: ZEN Browser extension to convert browser history into a knowledge graph for RAG

scripts.build: esbuild src/background/background.js --bundle --outfile=dist/background/background.js --format=esm --platform=browser && esbuild src/popup/popup.js --bundle --outfile=dist/popup/popup.js --format=iife --platform=browser && esbuild src/visualizer/visualizer.js --bundle --outfile=dist/visualizer/visualizer.js --format=iife --platform=browser && cp src/manifest.json dist/ && cp src/popup/popup.html dist/popup/ && cp src/popup/popup.css dist/popup/ && cp src/visualizer/visualizer.html dist/visualizer/ && cp src/visualizer/visualizer.css dist/visualizer/
